title: Planned power outage: Portion of Wilderness
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for a portion of Wilderness on Friday 12 April from 09:00 to 16:30 for alterations to the electrical mains.


> The following area will be affected:


- Langvlei Road
- Langvlei Avenue

Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period.

Should circumstances prevent the work being carried out during the abovementioned period, the work will be done on Friday 19 April from 09:00 to 16:30.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
